definitions.text: To slope or incline (something); to slant. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Tilt the barrel to pour out its contents.

definitions.text: To charge (at someone) with a lance.
The inclination of part of the body, such as backbone, pelvis, head, etc.
The controlled vertical movement of a camera, or a device to achieve this.
A canvas covering for carts, boats, etc.
Any covering overhead; especially, a tent.
To cover with a tilt, or awning.
